row1: 1-10

row2: 11-20

row3: 21-30

row4: 31-40

row5: 41-50

axes

x labels

y labels

grid

li(x) curve (smooth, slightly above pi(x)) - polyline approximation

pi(x) curve (step-like, below li(x))

legend

axes

axis labels

Re(s) tick labels

tick marks

critical strip (0 to 1) shading

critical line Re=1/2

known zeros on critical line (non-trivial zeros)

trivial zeros on negative real axis

labels

forward: multiplication

arrows forward

reverse: factorization

reverse arrows

Step boxes

arrows

Usage area

axis

x ticks

classical curve (sub-exponential, grows fast)

quantum curve (polynomial, grows slowly)

y labels qualitative

legend

timeline bar

milestones

current marker

Center node

Surrounding nodes

connecting lines
